title: Implement PS-SHA-∞ hash calling for 30k agents
description: Build hash calling system for agent-to-agent communication at scale. Use PS-SHA-∞ (infinite cascade hashing) for agent identity verification. Enable: (1) Direct agent-to-agent calls (2) Broadcast to agent groups (3) Identity verification (4) Collision prevention (5) Message routing. Integrate with [MEMORY] system.
